subcodes.title: Words to Miss Rosenberg in 1902(?)
subcodes.first_line: How could they (the Manifestations) teach and guide others in the Way if they themselves did not undergo every species of suffering to which other human beings are subjected.
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
